mapper.select: SELECT fa.id AS id, fa.entid AS entid, fa.frame_id AS frameId, fa.user_id AS userId, fa.is_mastart AS isMastart, fa.is_admin AS isAdmin, fa.superior_uid AS superiorUid, f.name AS frameName FROM eb_frame_assist fa LEFT JOIN eb_frame f ON f.id = fa.frame_id AND f.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE fa.user_id = #{userId} AND fa.entid = #{entid} AND fa.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY fa.is_mastart DESC

SELECT a.id AS id, a.name AS name, a.avatar AS avatar, a.uid AS uid FROM eb_admin a INNER JOIN eb_frame_assist fa ON fa.user_id = a.id AND fa.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE fa.frame_id = #{frameId} AND fa.entid = #{entid} AND fa.is_mastart = 1 AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.status = 1

SELECT fa.frame_id AS frameId, a.id AS id, a.name AS name, a.avatar AS avatar, a.phone AS phone, a.job AS job, a.uid AS uid FROM eb_frame_assist fa INNER JOIN eb_admin a ON a.id = fa.user_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE fa.entid = #{entid} AND fa.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.status = 1
